name: Knafaim Holdings Ltd
summary: Knafaim Holdings Ltd, through its subsidiaries, operates in the aviation industry. The company operates flights in various routes in Europe, Asia, Africa, and North America; and provides duty free products, preparing and supplying passenger caterings, various security services, and ongoing and general maintenance services for aircrafts, as well as manages travel agencies. It also engages in the purchase, lease, and sale of commercial aircrafts to airlines worldwide. In addition, the company offers military aircraft maintenance services to the Israeli Air Force; and ground handling service to airlines and private aircrafts operating in Ben Gurion international airport. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
